title: Better View Bobbing
description: Removes screen shaking when you're not sprinting.
body:
## Better View Bobbing

Removes screen shaking when you're not sprinting.

---

## Why
View Bobbing is objectively quite pleasing... However having it shake your crosshair while you bridge can be distracting. There are other "solutions" but I find them quite unintuitive.

- Disabling View Bobbing entirely
  - Yeah that fixes it... but I want view bobbing.
- Disabling Screen Shaking
  - Okay but that doesn't look as pleasing to me.
- Disabling View Bobbing with a keybind
  - Cool but I'd rather the mod do it for me

---
